headline: How The CF Industries (CF) Investment Story Is Shifting With Tight Nitrogen And New Risks
summary: CF Industries Holdings has seen its fair value estimate move from US$118.05 to US$120.95, a modest US$2.90 step up in the latest round of analyst work. That change comes as Street research leans toward higher price targets overall, with firms weighing tight nitrogen markets, geopolitical risk, and medium term demand in different ways. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting assumptions so you can keep up with the evolving narrative around the stock. Stay updated as the Fair...

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on CF Industries Holdings, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Ben Isaacson   maintains CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $115 to $120.

headline: CF Industries Repositions For Nitrogen Supply Shocks And Low Carbon Shift
summary: CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) is facing material supply disruptions as global nitrogen trade flows are reshaped by heightened geopolitical risks, including the Iran conflict and closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The company is committing capital to low carbon ammonia projects, including the Blue Point ammonia plant, as part of a broader shift toward lower emission production. CF Industries has also announced leadership changes, including the appointment of a new CFO from a major global...
